'''hohamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:gymnosporous|gymnosporous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:gymnosporous|gymnosporous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hohamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hohamithi|hohamithi]] || [[word:hohamiji|hohamiji]] || [[word:hohamishi|hohamishi]] || [[word:hohamiki|hohamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hohamuthuthu|hohamuthuthu]] || [[word:hohamujuju|hohamujuju]] || [[word:hohamushushu|hohamushushu]] || [[word:hohamukuku|hohamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hohamuthu|hohamuthu]] || [[word:hohamuju|hohamuju]] || [[word:hohamushu|hohamushu]] || [[word:hohamuku|hohamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hohamufthuf|hohamufthuf]] || [[word:hohamufjuf|hohamufjuf]] || [[word:hohamufshuf|hohamufshuf]] || [[word:hohamufkuf|hohamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hohamethe|hohamethe]] || [[word:hohameje|hohameje]] || [[word:hohameshe|hohameshe]] || [[word:hohameke|hohameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hohamothotho|hohamothotho]] || [[word:hohamojojo|hohamojojo]] || [[word:hohamoshosho|hohamoshosho]] || [[word:hohamokoko|hohamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hohamotho|hohamotho]] || [[word:hohamojo|hohamojo]] || [[word:hohamosho|hohamosho]] || [[word:hohamoko|hohamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hohamofthof|hohamofthof]] || [[word:hohamofjof|hohamofjof]] || [[word:hohamofshof|hohamofshof]] || [[word:hohamofkof|hohamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfthÃŸf|hohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfjÃŸf|hohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfshÃŸf|hohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfkÃŸf|hohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hohamÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hohamÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hohamÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hohamÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfthÃŸf|hohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfjÃŸf|hohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfshÃŸf|hohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfkÃŸf|hohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfthÃŸf|hohamÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfjÃŸf|hohamÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfshÃŸf|hohamÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hohamÃŸfkÃŸf|hohamÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hohamÃḊthÃḊ|hohamÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hohamÃḊjÃḊ|hohamÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hohamÃḊshÃḊ|hohamÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hohamÃḊkÃḊ|hohamÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hohamathatha|hohamathatha]] || [[word:hohamajaja|hohamajaja]] || [[word:hohamashasha|hohamashasha]] || [[word:hohamakaka|hohamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hohamatha|hohamatha]] || [[word:hohamaja|hohamaja]] || [[word:hohamasha|hohamasha]] || [[word:hohamaka|hohamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hohamafthaf|hohamafthaf]] || [[word:hohamafjaf|hohamafjaf]] || [[word:hohamafshaf|hohamafshaf]] || [[word:hohamafkaf|hohamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hohamasha|hohamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hohamshÃḋsha|hohamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hohamrosha|hohamrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hohamusha|hohamusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hohamyasha|hohamyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohohamnkshÃḋsha|gohohamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohohamnkrosha|gohohamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohohamnkmusha|gohohamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohohamnkyasha|gohohamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hohahamasha|hohahamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hohahamshÃḋsha|hohahamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hohahamrosha|hohahamrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hohahamusha|hohahamusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hohahamyasha|hohahamyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohohahamnkshÃḋsha|gohohahamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohohahamnkrosha|gohohahamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohohahamnkmusha|gohohahamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohohahamnkyasha|gohohahamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hehÃḊmasha|hehÃḊmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hehÃḊmshÃḋsha|hehÃḊmshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hehÃḊmrosha|hehÃḊmrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hehÃḊmusha|hehÃḊmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hehÃḊmyasha|hehÃḊmyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohehÃḊmnkshÃḋsha|gohehÃḊmnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohehÃḊmnkrosha|gohehÃḊmnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohehÃḊmnkmusha|gohehÃḊmnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohehÃḊmnkyasha|gohehÃḊmnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hohfamasha|hohfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hohfamshÃḋsha|hohfamshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hohfamrosha|hohfamrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hohfamusha|hohfamusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hohfamyasha|hohfamyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohohfamnkshÃḋsha|gohohfamnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohohfamnkrosha|gohohfamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohohfamnkmusha|gohohfamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohohfamnkyasha|gohohfamnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
